title: lupinus polyphyllus var. burkei
intro: Lupinus polyphyllus var. burkei, also known as the Burke lupine, is a variety of the lupine plant, which is a flowering plant in the legume family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. The Burke lupine is rich in nutrients and has been traditionally used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
